message:
test(runtime,server): add audit regression tests and remove dead RegistryState struct

Runtime blocking pool (blocking_pool.rs):
- Added spawn_thread_on_inner_rollback_on_overflow test verifying that
  when active_threads equals max_threads, spawn_thread_on_inner is a
  no-op — no CAS increment occurs and no OS thread is spawned, confirming
  the capacity ceiling is enforced
- Added completion_wait_after_signal_returns_immediately test confirming
  that BlockingTaskCompletion::wait_timeout returns true instantly after
  signal_done() was already called, preventing spurious blocking

Server connection manager (connection.rs):
- Removed unused RegistryState struct (dead code — ConnectionManager uses
  its own internal HashMap + AtomicU64 directly, not this wrapper)
- Added concurrent_register_respects_capacity test: 10 threads race to
  register against a capacity-5 manager, verifying at most 5 succeed via
  a barrier-synchronized start and atomic success counter
- Added guard_drop_notifies_all_closed test: registers a connection,
  verifies active_count is 1, drops the guard, then verifies active_count
  returns to 0 and is_empty returns true, confirming the Drop impl
  correctly removes the entry and notifies waiters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
